_comment: Pre-baked PO answers for eval scenario 0 (init-from-scratch). Consumed by the LLM running the skill in eval mode; the LLM replays these answers verbatim instead of calling AskUserQuestion.

product.name: Acme Shop
product.one_line_description: A web storefront for boutique fashion brands.
product.core_value: Help boutique brands sell directly to fans without middlemen.

vision.north_star: Become the default direct-to-fan storefront for boutique fashion in 3 years.
vision.problem_narrative: Boutique brands lose 3-5% to marketplace middlemen and have no direct fan channel.

personas_detail.shopper: discovers brands via social, buys 2-4x per year, values curation
personas_detail.store-admin: manages 1-2 boutique catalogs, ships under 50 orders/week
